title: Senior Manager, Sale & Purchase
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

MB SHIPBROKERS ASIA LIMITED was founded in 1914 as a Danish shipbroking company and has grown into one of the world's largest international shipbroking firms. With global market coverage and offices in major shipping centres worldwide, MB Shipbrokers serves leading shipowners, charterers, shipbuilders, financial institutions, and banks.

Job Summary

We are expanding our Sale & Purchase Team and seek experienced shipbrokers to manage diverse tonnage markets. You will drive business growth by leveraging your shipbroking expertise, collaborating within a dynamic team, and delivering results in a fast-paced environment.

Responsibilities

  • Lead negotiations and close transactions for Sale & Purchase and Newbuilding vessels to achieve business targets
  • Apply shipbroking expertise to analyse market trends and advise clients on optimal vessel acquisitions and sales
  • Communicate effectively with clients and internal teams to coordinate deal execution and maintain strong relationships
  • Demonstrate initiative by proactively identifying new business opportunities and responding to market changes
  • Collaborate within a team environment to balance individual performance with collective goals
  • Utilize proficiency in written and spoken English to prepare clear, professional documentation and correspondence

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proven shipbroking experience, preferably in Sale & Purchase and Newbuildings

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Strong negotiation skills applied to closing complex shipping transactions
  • Adaptability and self-motivation to thrive in a busy, dynamic work environment
  • Effective communication skills to engage diverse stakeholders

postedCompany.description:
MB SHIPBROKERS ASIA LIMITED

Background

Founded by Mr. A.P. Moeller in 1914 as a small, independent Danish shipbroking company engaged in traditional break bulk chartering, sale & purchase and ship agency.

Business initially focused on Scandinavia and Northwest Europe, but during 1950- and 1960-ties gradually expanded into shipbroking in the U.K. and a few locations within Asia.

Accelerated business growth from the mid 1990-ties with the business concept calling for a global scope with own local offices located in main shipping centres worldwide.

Activities

With a global market coverage of tonnage in all sizes and segments, MB Shipbrokers cater globally to all shipbroking requirements from leading shipowners, charterers and shipbuilders as well as financial institutions and banks.

Being one of the world's largest international shipbroking companies, we employ about 250 brokers and staff at offices in Copenhagen, London, Athens, New York, Seattle, Tokyo, Seoul, Beijing, Shanghai, Hong Kong, Taipei, Hanoi, Singapore, and Dubai.
